description: Product Description THESE FOOLS PUT MY CAPE ON BACKWARDS x 1 TO FIT 0-3 YEARS | SIGNATURE SOFT FABRICS | BOYS OR GIRLS Neutral colours to these funny bibs make it perfect for baby boys or girls & make it an ideal little baby shower gift or as part of funky little gifts set for 1st birthday, Christmas or twin babies or adding to a gift newborn gift hamper. BOREDOM BUSTING BIB - GIVE A SHOW STOPPIN’ GIFT! Attention-grabbing unique funny baby bib by Baby Moo's, instantly add some superhero styled fun into meal times with our funny baby bibs, unique bold designs that put the other baby bibs to shame. Give as a show stopping baby gift to the mum to be & be the envy of all the others at the baby shower. MADE FOR LONG LASTING QUALITY Our perfectly playful funny baby bibs are designed in the UK & made by our family run independent production partner in Tamil Nadu, ensuring superhero quality. Vibrant absorbent soft cotton front & a naturally moisture repellent fleece back keeping baby’s chest dry & clothing changes at bay. Our bibs come with adjustable size settings, seeing baby through til toddlerhood & keeping your bank balance happy! Our funny baby bibs are individually & professionally printed meaning the print keeps packing a punch wash after wash. Slogan reads; THESE FOOLS PUT MY CAPE ON BACKWARDS SERIOUSLY SOFT & EASY CARE The signature soft cotton & fleece fabric stays soft & cosy wash after wash, keeping baby smiling & the comic loving parents happy. Machine washable (because parents have enough to do, are we right!?) DESIGNED FOR TANTRUM FREE CHANGING TIME Our cool baby bibs boast adjustable size settings seeing baby through til toddler years & soft style which make it easy to get baby ready in 5 & tantrum free, making it the new mum’s go-to favourite. Boredom Busting Bibs & Loved By Parents Boredom busting baby bibs, Mum & Dad's new go-to favourite
